question: Save model1.state_dict() to /tmp/model.pt. Create model2 and load the state_dict. Verify match.
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

torch.manual_seed(42)
model1 = nn.Linear(10, 2)
torch.save(model1.???(), '/tmp/model.pt')
model2 = nn.Linear(10, 2)
model2.???(torch.load('/tmp/model.pt'))
match = torch.allclose(model1.weight, model2.weight)
print(f"Models match: {match}")
